title: Smooth Double Doors
description: Make double doors, trapdoors, and fence gates open together with fluid smooth animations, fully configurable and texture-pack friendly.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5119c6a7e5afa8901d808feca66b0e63e4b9fc85_0.webp)

Smooth Double Doors makes _**paired doors open together**_ and adds _**fluid animations**_ to _**doors**_, _**trapdoors**_, and _**fence gates**_. It keeps vanilla behavior and works with redstone, while letting you toggle features and adjust animation speed in‑game config. The mod is _**texture‑pack friendly**_ and does _**not replace models or require resource packs**_, so it plays nicely with your existing packs.

Supports all door, trapdoor, and fence gate types.

By default, double trapdoors and double fence gates are disabled, but you can enable them in the mod’s settings. Everything is fully configurable!

![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ef934457f61d163da0934d664e4f9d6127462b5.png)

# Dependencies
Requires [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for the config screen.


# Soon
1.20 to 26.1

Forge Version
